title: Cursed Treasure: Level Pack!
description: Level pack for the popular tower defense game Cursed Treasure. It includes the set of brand new levels and a number of improvements and bug fixes. Take on the role as the evil overlord of the orcs, demons and the undead and protect you gems from being stolen by the righteous heroes.
tags: 2D, Defense, Fantasy, HTML5, Jewel, Strategy, Tower Defense
